paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, with a change of -3.95% from the prior close and -20.9% over a 21-session window. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news includes an article from NewsChannel 10 on MSN about Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built near Pantex, and an article from PR Newswire about the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

Recent news is driven by developments such as Project Matador and updates on the company's shares. The company has also made recent appointments, including George Wentz as General Counsel, Anna Bofa as Chief Commercial Officer, Jacobo Ortiz as Chief Operating Officer, and Rob Masson as Chief Financial Officer, as disclosed in an 8-K filing on July 23, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, about the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a Form 8-K/A filing on July 21, 2026, about the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 4 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a mention of a Google job posting in Amarillo and a reference to the latest 8K filing.
